## Problem statement
Describe the problem or limitation you're trying to solve.

## Proposed solution
Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches have you considered?

## Additional context
Any other context or examples (mockups, links, etc.) that might help clarify the request.

## Checklist
- [ ] I've read the [documentation](../docs) and [CONTRIBUTING guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've checked existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] This is not a security issue (if so, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))
